stories.title: To Game 7 we go: How the Spurs extended the West f...
stories.summary: What was most surprising about Spurs' Game 6 win? And who is biggest X factor for Saturday's game?

stories.title: Spurs roll past Thunder as WCF head to Game 7
stories.summary: Victor Wembanyama had 28 points, 10 rebounds and three blocks and the San Antonio Spurs sent the Western Conference finals back to Oklahoma City for Game 7, routing the Thunder 118-91 on Thursday night.

stories.title: 4-time Cup champ Claude Lemieux dies at 60
stories.summary: Claude Lemieux, who won the Stanley Cup four times during a memorable NHL career, died Thursday at age 60. Authorities said Lemieux died by suicide.

stories.title: Knicks' Robinson has broken finger, sources say
stories.summary: Knicks center Mitchell Robinson has suffered a broken right pinkie finger ahead of the NBA Finals, and there is no timetable for his return, sources told ESPN's Shams Charania.

stories.title: McGuire: TTU willing to play Texas in Week 1
stories.summary: After Texas coach Steve Sarkisian made headlines by torching Texas Tech's strength of schedule, Red Raiders coach Joey McGuire shot back with an open invitation for the Horns to pay a visit to Lubbock.
